text:
Fixed. Made several changes:
1. Added `overflow-visible` to the Card component to prevent clipping
2. Removed `overflow-hidden` from the parent div
3. Made badges even smaller (`text-[9px]`, `h-4`, `px-1`, `leading-none`)
4. Added `flex-shrink-0` and `ml-2` to the badge container to ensure they have dedicated space
5. Changed gap from `gap-1` to `gap-0.5` to make badges more compact

The badges should now display fully without being cut off.
